framework.name: SMB Payment Ceiling for AI Services
framework.description: Small businesses have limited willingness/ability to pay for AI automation services. Creator who works with SMBs states they definitively do not pay $300K scale amounts. Suggests SMB market has natural ceiling that limits solo operator revenue potential without moving upmarket or changing model.
framework.raw_quote: And a lot of them actually say to small businesses. I've worked with small businesses. I guarantee you they are not paying you that much money.

source.title: The TRUTH About Selling AI Automations to Businesses
